turns.assistantContent:
---

## Testing Report

**Scope:** Three session journal handler bugs â€” ENOENT errors and broken SDKâ†’semantic session lookup

**Test Files Created:**
- `tests/integration/handler-bugs.test.ts`

### Test Suites

| Suite | Tests | Passing | Failing |
|-------|-------|---------|---------|
| createEventHandler (Bug 1) | 1 | 0 | **1** |
| createCompactionJournalHandler (Bug 2) | 1 | 0 | **1** |
| createTextCompleteHandler (Bug 3) | 2 | 0 | **2** |
| **Total** | **4** | **0** | **4** |

### Test Execution Output

```
FAIL  tests/integration/handler-bugs.test.ts (4 tests | 4 failed)
  Ă— creates session file on first idle event (no ENOENT)         513ms
    â†’ ENOENT: no such file or directory, open '...ses_test_idle_001.json'
    â†’ Expected at least one session .json file, found: []

  Ă— creates session file on first compaction event (no ENOENT)     11ms
    â†’ ENOENT: no such file or directory, open '...ses_test_compaction_001.json'
    â†’ Expected at least one session .json file, found: []

  Ă— findSessionBySdkId locates session by raw SDK ID after first text.complete  29ms
    â†’ findSessionBySdkId returned null
    â†’ expected null not to be null

  Ă— compaction-handler can find session created by text-complete-handler via SDK ID  9ms
    â†’ Session created by text-complete not findable by SDK ID
    â†’ expected null not to be null
```

### Bugs Proven

| Bug | Root Cause | Evidence |
|-----|-----------|----------|
| **Bug 1** â€” `createEventHandler` | Calls `addEvent(sessionsDir, { sessionId })` without `initSession` first. `loadSession` â†’ `readFile` â†’ ENOENT. | `ENOENT open '...ses_test_idle_001.json'` |
| **Bug 2** â€” `createCompactionJournalHandler` | Same pattern â€” calls `addEvent` + `incrementCounter` without `initSession`. | `ENOENT open '...ses_test_compaction_001.json'` |
| **Bug 3** â€” `createTextCompleteHandler` | Calls `initSession` WITHOUT `sdkSessionId`, so no symlink is created and `findSessionBySdkId` can't locate the session by raw SDK ID. | `findSessionBySdkId` returns `null` |

### Edge Cases Covered

| Case | Test | Status |
|------|------|--------|
| First idle event on new session | Bug 1 â€” creates session file on first idle event | âś— FAIL |
| First compaction on new session | Bug 2 â€” creates session file on first compaction event | âś— FAIL |
| SDKâ†’semantic lookup after text.complete | Bug 3a â€” findSessionBySdkId locates session by raw SDK ID | âś— FAIL |
| Cross-handler session discovery | Bug 3b â€” compaction finds session created by text.complete | âś— FAIL |

### Verification Command

```bash
npx vitest run tests/integration/handler-bugs.test.ts
```

**RED state confirmed.** All 4 tests fail. The handler factories need fixes: Bugs 1 & 2 need `initSession` calls before `addEvent`; Bug 3 needs `sdkSessionId` passed to `initSession` so `createSdkSymlink` is invoked.
